curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Primary vulnerability is in parse_jwt_token in user_credentials.py, which decoded the JWT bearer token but did not verify the issuer claim against allowed AAD tenants. Secondary locations are the info and negotiate endpoint handlers, which lacked call_if_user authorization wrappers — all other HTTP endpoints already used call_if_user/call_if_agent. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. The patch modifies 12 files total (8 non-test source files), but many are deployment scripts, type models, and docs generators. L3 hints now differentiate from L1/L2 by naming Azure Active Directory and JWT-specific context. Vulnerability class auth-bypass confirmed from CWE-285/CWE-346/CWE-863 and the patch diff.
